global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with engaging text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting weekend travel deals with a focus on user-generated content.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Various abstract geometric shapes in lighter shades of purple scattered across the background.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: A large, semi-transparent rectangle overlaying the background, creating depth.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A prominent rectangular area in the center featuring text and a call-to-action.

elements.label: NomadLaye logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left, featuring the text 'NomadLaye' in bold, modern typography.

elements.label: User-generated content badge
elements.description: A small badge next to the logo indicating 'UGC' in a simple, clean font.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top stating 'NomadLaye UGC' in a striking font.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: A clear, inviting message in the center stating 'Escape this weekend Special fares today' in a friendly font.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Special fares today

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A prominent price tag reading '€29.99' in a bold font, positioned at the bottom.
